title: Sambalpur Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Sambalpur with a Z-Score of +3.29. The city is experiencing extreme temperatures, scoring 10.0/10 on the heat wave index.
body:
The current heat wave in Sambalpur is causing significant discomfort, with a relative humidity of 73% and wind speed of 4.4 km/h. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 10.5 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling. 
 The city's infrastructure is under strain, with the heat wave expected to continue in the coming days.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the heat wave's impact on Sambalpur.
